title: WAF NoSQL Injection Attack Blocked
description: Detects NoSQL injection attempts (MongoDB, CouchDB) blocked by WAF. Attackers inject NoSQL query operators to bypass authentication or extract data. OWASP A03:2021 Injection.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK') and ( (('Request URL' like '*$gt*' or 'Request URL' like '*$ne*' or 'Request URL' like '*$regex*' or 'Request URL' like '*$where*' or 'Request URL' like '*$exists*' or 'Request URL' like '*$nin*' or 'Request URL' like '*$or*' or 'Request URL' like '*$and*' or 'Request URL' like '*[$gt]*' or 'Request URL' like '*[$ne]*' or 'Request URL' like '*[$regex]*' or 'Request URL' like '*{$gt:*' or 'Request URL' like '*{$ne:*')) or (('Request Body' like '*$gt*' or 'Request Body' like '*$ne*' or 'Request Body' like '*$regex*' or 'Request Body' like '*$where*' or 'Request Body' like '*{"$gt":*')) ))
falsepositives: Legitimate MongoDB query APIs exposed through REST
